title: feat(pricing): 3-tier Stripe checkout + webhook + thanks page (9d15921)
detail: Added 12 files, +2,642 lines. /pricing + /api/stripe/checkout + /api/stripe/webhook + /thanks/subscription + 15 unit tests. All gates green (typecheck, test, build).

title: Bulk-archive 25 placeholder shells (C6 verdict)
detail: Set status=abandoned + tags=[manus,placeholder] on 23 score-5 Manus exports + 2 empty shells (meme-agent-git-only, apex-xepa-hub). Active slate went from 36 projects to 11 real ones.

title: safeParse fence-stripping + max_tokens 2K→4K in @k187/ai
detail: MiniMax M3 wraps responses in ```json fences which tripped safeParse and forced heuristic fallback on every analysis. Fix: strip fences, demand JSON-only in prompt, bump token budget. Two analyses confirmed working post-fix.

title: Scanner slug-collision fix in apps/scanner/src/cli.ts
detail: Re-scanning a moved project whose package.json name collided with an existing slug crashed with "Unique constraint failed on the fields: (slug)". Fix: findUnique({id}) now falls back to findUnique({slug}); update adopts new id.

title: Created github.com/kaliyuga187/k187-recovery-os
detail: Public repo. Origin wired. Branch=main. 4 commits pushed.

title: Opened draft PR #3 on 123automateme-hub (Stripe checkout deploy checklist)
detail: Branch feat/pricing-stripe-checkout with trigger commit so PR can be opened. Stripe commits (9d15921, 08e2d91, fe8f447) already on main per direct push authorization.

title: feat(monetize): 18-product service catalog + /services + /hire + Stripe checkout (31bd9b2)
detail: Added typed catalog of 6 services × 3 packages + Hire retainer ($5K/mo). New pages: /services, /services/[slug], /hire, /thanks/service. New API: /api/stripe/service-checkout (one-time payment mode). 7 files, +1,529 lines.

title: Bulk-private 3 own repos (page-agent, Polycrack, vite-react)
detail: Per user instruction: keep forks public, make all own non-public repos private. Final state: 2 own repos public (123automateme-hub + k187-recovery-os) + 43 forks public + 48 own repos private.

title: feat(dashboard): /works + /agents pages + JSONL-backed activity tracker
detail: Built visual dashboard for tracking Hermes + Kai + agent work. Backed by .operator/works.jsonl + .operator/agents.jsonl (no Prisma client generation needed). Pages: /works (timeline + by-kind breakdown), /agents (registry + recent runs). API: POST /api/works, POST /api/agents. Dashboard page fixed (placeholders.length undefined bug) + nav updated.

title: Marketing summaries via MiniMax M3 for 11 active projects
detail: Generated 9 of 11 project summaries (code batch + ar15-mobile correctly skipped as low-signal). kaio-cards hallucinated as "card issuance backend" in part 2 (correct: Pokemon TCG price looker). ~12K tokens, <$0.01.

title: 93-repo GitHub health grid
detail: Full audit of all 93 repos under kaliyuga187. Sorted by recency. 6 stale (>180d), 41 with open issues. Top traffic: claude-flow 46, ai-prompt-free-zone 16, heretic 10, freqtrade 10.

title: Extracted + scanned react-repo/concrete-estimator + ar15-mobile from Archives/package*.zip
detail: Found 2 real products hidden in Downloads/Archives/. package.zip → react-repo (Vite+React+Tailwind, comp 30, action finish). package (1).zip → ar15-mobile (4-file stub, comp 21, action archive) + product-valuator (only index.html).

title: Wrote AGENTS.md for 123automateme-hub, nexus-frontend, nexus-ai-mobile, Downloads/Code
detail: Cross-agent conventions. Hub file committed as fe8f447. Verified Claude Code auto-discovers via --add-dir path (auth check happens after discovery).

title: Standalone POST endpoint now works
detail: All append helpers + POST handlers added back after patch gap.

title: feat(dashboard): standalone Node server works around Next.js + Node 24 segfault (f5f44c4)
detail: scripts/dashboard-server.cjs (580+ lines, zero deps). Reads .operator/works.jsonl + agents.jsonl, renders hand-written HTML, serves on 127.0.0.1:3737. Verified HTTP 200 on all 6 endpoints.

title: fix(dashboard): add missing appendJSONL/appendWorkLog/appendAgentRun helpers (b8b74c5)
detail: First commit of dashboard-server.cjs was missing the append* functions. POST endpoints crashed with appendWorkLog is not defined. Patch adds the three missing functions after getAgentsSummary. Verified: HTTP 201 on POST, count went 13 to 14 to 15.

title: Pushed both repos: 123automateme-hub (2 commits) + k187-recovery-os (6 commits)
detail: 123automateme-hub: c36be00 + 31bd9b2 (Stripe checkout + monetization). k187-recovery-os: f5a2c56 + b8b74c5 + f5f44c4 + c6a1fc1 + fd1b24e + 31b9dd5 + 94142b9 + a60105e (dashboard + infra + agents + marketing).

title: Scanned 4 unscanned archives: 1 real project (phantom-call-spec, comp 22)
detail: polymarket-edge.zip = skill bundle only (not a project). phantom-call-spec.zip = real Vite+React+TS+MediaPipe project, 21 files, has tests + drizzle. ai-metalaunch.zip = 86 webp screenshots (no source). adhd-assistant.zip = 7-file Expo RN scaffold + CLAUDE.md noting code is unverified. Inserted 3 into DB directly (scanner crashes on Node 24, access violation 0xC0000005). phantom-call-spec is the only new actionable build.

title: Round 4: scanned 4 archives + triaged 82 GitHub issues + shipped MEMORY.md
detail: Archive scan: phantom-call-spec (real product, comp 22, Vite+React+TS+MediaPipe), ai-metalaunch (86 screenshots), adhd-assistant (Expo RN scaffold), polymarket-edge (skill only). Inserted 3 to DB via Prisma direct (scanner crashes on Node 24). Issue triage: 82 open issues across claude-flow/ai-prompt-free-zone/heretic/freqtrade are ALL Dependabot PRs, zero real issues needing human attention. Shipped MEMORY.md cheatsheet (8.6KB) covering all 13 active projects + commands + blocklist + blockers + priority list.
